task_text: Draft a status update email to Meridian Group summarizing where Project Helios stands this week. Tone should be professional and reassuring. Save the draft as meridian_status_email_draft.txt.

input.content:
Subject: Project Helios Weekly Status Update

Dear Meridian Group,

I hope you are doing well. I wanted to share a brief status update on Project Helios for this week.

Project Helios remains on track, with the team continuing to make steady progress against the current work plan. This week’s focus has been on advancing the active workstreams, reviewing open items, and ensuring dependencies are being managed appropriately. At this stage, there are no major concerns to report, and any outstanding questions or follow-ups are being tracked through the normal project channels.

Looking ahead, the team will continue moving forward on the next set of deliverables and will keep Meridian Group informed of any material updates, decisions needed, or changes to timing. We remain confident in the current direction and will continue to monitor progress closely.

Please let us know if there are any specific areas you would like covered in more detail in the next update.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
